body.u: Going out with a girl. Married four kids. Staying for exams. Comfortable living. Confusion over work. 41-69. Lived life to the full.
At this particular time I am going out with a nice girl. She and I are 16 we both wish that when we are about 21 plus, we will be married.

My parents are not all that keen on my staying on at school. If I left at this particular time I do not think I would sucseedsucceed at a job. But I want to stay on for two or three years to get one or two Advanced subjects. With these you stand a much greater chance. The reason for these “A” subject for me is that I wish to become a P.E. teacher. I know the money is not that fantastic but is a good and interesting occupation.
With this I could bring a family up fairly well.

My maragemarriage now is in its third year. I am now 25. We have no children yet, because we are only just getting the house habitable. I am a qualified Physical education teacher adnand my wife is a customs and excise officer. SheHer income is pretty good.
30 now have two children and my wife has given her job in. Kids are so demanding!
Now reaches the ripe old age of 40 and we have 4 kids. One of them is 15, a 13 year old, 11 years old and a 9 year old.
The 15 year old is studying for his exams. He wants to be a doctor. The other three have not yet decided on what they would like to do.
My occupation as a p.e. teacher is not very good at 45. So now I am thinking of teaching a full time subject.
During the last 20 years I have been abroad and brought up a nice family. The sex side of life is now declining but you just exceptaccept it.
My children have all left home now and my wife and I are both at the age of 65.
My children are all at good high paid jobs accept the youngest who can’t still get a job.

I am now wondering who will die first my lovely wife or my self. I would hate my wife to die first because I would not want her life to be deprived. But on the other hand I would not like to die first because it would leavleave my wife alone and old.
“Oh no my wife has died”. Seeing this disturbed me so much that I died of a heart attack.
I hope the kids do not get totoo upset. But I expect them to mismiss us.
